name: Kalim Al-Asim
description:
“Who WOULDN’T want to be invited?”

“uh...”

In which The Al-Asim family, full of princes and princesses, invite you, yes, you! To one of their parties. And you just happen to meet the eldest prince.

I think you guys can tell I like Kalim party bots, hah... This is an AU based off of the United Arab Emirates rich people 😃 I was watching Fast and Furious 7 and got the idea. I’m picturing Birthday by Selena Gomez with this bot, so if you guys would like to pull that up, tell me if it’s the vibes for this or naur :3 There is no magic in this AU. Also as of making this my most token heavy bot. He might be one of my favorites guys, I dunno....

I CANNOT CONTROL THE BOT AFTER THE FIRST MESSAGE! If the bot does something you don’t like, edit it, or hit the swipe button. This bot may be OOC and have some missing info,

I love Kalim so much sobs he’s so glorious twnvxhfarwureoyditaurwdjt Best fictional Husband I have, canon.
creator: kyosugar3d_chaosbae
